name: scripts/xlsx_cli.py
description: High-level xlsx CLI: create a complete .xlsx from a workbook JSON spec in one call (no manual XML editing). Pass _args=["create", "--output", "out.xlsx"] and workbook={sheets:[...]}. See SKILL.md CREATE section for schema.

workbook.description: Workbook spec with sheets/rows/cells; see SKILL.md for full schema

name: scripts/style_audit.py
description: Audit workbook styles and formatting consistency

name: scripts/xlsx_add_column.py
description: Insert a derived column into an unpacked workbook

name: scripts/xlsx_insert_row.py
description: Insert a row into an unpacked workbook and repair formulas

name: scripts/xlsx_pack.py
description: Pack an unpacked workbook folder into an .xlsx file

name: scripts/xlsx_reader.py
description: Read workbook structure and sample content

name: scripts/xlsx_shift_rows.py
description: Shift worksheet rows in unpacked workbook XML

name: scripts/xlsx_unpack.py
description: Unpack an .xlsx workbook into editable XML parts
